# datahub_role (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Looks up a built-in DataHub role by name and returns its URN.

DataHub ships three built-in roles -- `Admin`, `Editor`, and `Reader` -- seeded at bootstrap. They are not creatable, editable, or deletable. Use this data source to resolve a role name to its URN for use with `datahub_role_assignment`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Resolve a built-in role (Admin, Editor, or Reader) to its URN.
data "datahub_role" "admin" {
  name = "Admin"
}

output "admin_role_urn" {
  value = data.datahub_role.admin.urn
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The role name to look up: `Admin`, `Editor`, or `Reader`. Becomes the URN suffix (`urn:li:dataHubRole:<name>`).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the role.
- `editable` (Boolean) Whether the role is editable. Built-in roles return `false`.
- `urn` (String) Full DataHub URN for this role (e.g. `urn:li:dataHubRole:Admin`).
